assumptions: Mock India site selection uses seeded cluster scoring rather than full geospatial analysis.

candidates.name: Dahej
candidates.rationale: Strong petrochemical ecosystem, port access, and utility backbone.

candidates.name: Paradip
candidates.rationale: Port access and eastern India logistics upside, but weaker integration than Gujarat.

india_location_data.utility_note: Mature industrial utility ecosystem and steam/power availability.
india_location_data.logistics_note: Strong chemical-cluster logistics and export connectivity.
india_location_data.regulatory_note: Established chemical-zone operating context with mature compliance ecosystem.

india_location_data.logistics_note: Good feedstock and product dispatch linkages.
india_location_data.regulatory_note: Industrial cluster advantage but site-specific compliance envelope still required.

india_location_data.utility_note: Industrial utility support available with project-specific development.
india_location_data.logistics_note: Useful for eastern dispatch but less dense chemical services.
india_location_data.regulatory_note: Would need stronger project-specific ecosystem build-out.

markdown: Dahej, Gujarat is selected because it best combines petrochemical integration, port logistics, utilities, industrial services, and a defendable India cost basis for a 200000 TPA EG plant.
